subject: Tangela, a blue round Pokemon almost entirely covered in writhing blue vines, with two wide white eyes peeking through, standing in a jungle-like environment
description: A round blue creature stands in a tropical or jungle-like environment, its body nearly entirely obscured by a mass of thick blue vines that writhe and drape in all directions. Only two wide white eyes are clearly visible through the tangle of vines. The background shows large tropical leaves and warm earthy tones — orange, yellow-green, consistent with a dense jungle setting. The creature's true body shape is almost entirely hidden by the vines, which trail outward and blend with the vegetation behind it. The overall effect is visually dense and slightly mysterious.
foreground: Tangela, round blue body entirely wrapped in thick blue vines, two white eyes visible
background: tropical jungle with large leaves, warm orange-yellow-green tones
